scripts.types: WRANGLER_LOG_PATH=/tmp/cf-webmail-wrangler.log wrangler types apps/web/worker-configuration.d.ts --config apps/web/wrangler.jsonc --env-interface WebEnv --include-runtime false && WRANGLER_LOG_PATH=/tmp/cf-webmail-wrangler.log wrangler types apps/ingest/worker-configuration.d.ts --config apps/ingest/wrangler.jsonc --env-interface IngestEnv --include-runtime false && WRANGLER_LOG_PATH=/tmp/cf-webmail-wrangler.log wrangler types apps/jobs/worker-configuration.d.ts --config apps/jobs/wrangler.jsonc --env-interface JobsEnv --include-runtime false
scripts.types:check: WRANGLER_LOG_PATH=/tmp/cf-webmail-wrangler.log wrangler types apps/web/worker-configuration.d.ts --config apps/web/wrangler.jsonc --env-interface WebEnv --include-runtime false --check && WRANGLER_LOG_PATH=/tmp/cf-webmail-wrangler.log wrangler types apps/ingest/worker-configuration.d.ts --config apps/ingest/wrangler.jsonc --env-interface IngestEnv --include-runtime false --check && WRANGLER_LOG_PATH=/tmp/cf-webmail-wrangler.log wrangler types apps/jobs/worker-configuration.d.ts --config apps/jobs/wrangler.jsonc --env-interface JobsEnv --include-runtime false --check
scripts.typecheck: npm run types:check && tsc -p packages/contracts/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/database/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p apps/web/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p apps/ingest/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p apps/jobs/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p tests/tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.test: npm run test:workers && npm run test:node
scripts.db:migrate:local: WRANGLER_LOG_PATH=/tmp/cf-webmail-wrangler.log wrangler d1 migrations apply cf-webmail --local --config apps/web/wrangler.jsonc
scripts.build:dry: WRANGLER_LOG_PATH=/tmp/cf-webmail-wrangler.log wrangler deploy --dry-run --config apps/web/wrangler.jsonc --outdir dist/web && WRANGLER_LOG_PATH=/tmp/cf-webmail-wrangler.log wrangler deploy --dry-run --config apps/ingest/wrangler.jsonc --outdir dist/ingest && WRANGLER_LOG_PATH=/tmp/cf-webmail-wrangler.log wrangler deploy --dry-run --config apps/jobs/wrangler.jsonc --outdir dist/jobs
scripts.check: npm run audit:prod && npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build:dry
